generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing real-time raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel DeepSense D435i depth camera capturing stereo vision data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance ChassisEgoSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On-board chassis electronics measuring vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ChassisSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On-board chassis electronics measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance ElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder electronic speed controller receiving voltage commands for vehicle speed regulation"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo receiving angle commands for vehicle direction control"
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance EgoSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChassisEgoSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChassisSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Packages
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stereo vision depth data from Intel D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Packages
]

instance EgoSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle ego speed measurements from chassis electronics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Packages
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle measurements from chassis electronics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Packages
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived object tracks stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Packages
]

instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN point-cloud clustering module for raw LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Packages
]

instance ObjectTrackerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman-filter based object tracker processing point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Packages
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model implementing ISO 15622 logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Packages
]

instance Visualization3DModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3-D visualization model for real-time environment rendering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Packages
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Packages : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 packages written in Python 3.8 and C++ for data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for advanced ACC algorithm processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance JetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK on Jetson hardware for edge computing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance OPCUA : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC UA transport protocol for industrial communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Functional Entity for serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI visualization, reporting and storage of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, VehicleStateReportInsight, VehicleStateStorageAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of ACC algorithm on external compute and returning computed speed"
    DTDFVocab:provides ComputedSpeedInsight, ACCAlgorithmExecutionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI controls for enabling/disabling ACC, adjusting set-point speed, and issuing emergency brake"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCmd, DisableACCCmd, AdjustSetPointSpeedCmd, EmergencyBrakeCmd
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time UI visualization of speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path"
]

instance VehicleStateReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Post-mission analysis reports of vehicle state data"
]

instance ComputedSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Desired speed decisions from ACC algorithm"
]

instance VehicleStateStorageAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Storage of vehicle state data in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCAlgorithmExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Execution of ACC algorithm on external compute"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable ACC system via UI control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable ACC system via UI control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustSetPointSpeedCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust ACC set-point speed via UI control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issue emergency brake command via UI control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on on-board Jetson hardware"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity deployed on external compute"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity for operator interface"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, HokuyoUST10LXLidar, IntelDeepSenseD435iDepthCamera, ChassisEgoSpeedSensor, ChassisSteeringAngleSensor, ElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends desired speed commands, ACC enable/disable signals, modified speed set-points, and emergency braking commands back to the PT through the Actuation FE, which translates them into motor voltage and steering servo signals."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All DT-PT interactions are bounded by a maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms and the distributed components maintain clock synchronization within 100 ms, satisfying real-time requirements for ACC."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation orchestrates the Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators), the Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC, reporting, visualization) and the User Entity (UI panels), communicating intra-entity via ROS 2 and inter-entity over Wi-Fi using the standardized interface defined in requirement R1."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is employed during design (cyber-physical experimentation), testing, deployment, and runtime operation for monitoring, validation and remote control of the ACC function."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High-fidelity interaction is ensured by maintaining ≤100 ms latency, synchronized clocks, real-time sensor sampling, and adherence to ISO 15622 ACC specifications; the DT stores raw and processed data for offline validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication uses ROS 2 topics for intra-entity data exchange and Wi‑Fi (IP-based) for inter-entity links; a standardized communication interface (R1) and the Data Translation FE perform serialization, type alignment and unit conversion."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity and User Entity run on external compute (e.g., a workstation or cloud server) separate from the on-board Jetson devices that host the Physical Twin Entity; each Functional Entity is packaged as an independent ROS 2 node."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system follows ISO 23247 reference architecture, utilizes ISO/IEC 30173 terminology, implements ACC logic per ISO 15622, and aligns latency requirements with 3GPP TS 22.185 (V2V) specifications."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include the 100 ms latency bound, 100 ms clock synchronization, and adherence to ISO 15622 ACC safety class I; remote commands are mediated through the User Interface FE to prevent unsafe actuation, but explicit security mechanisms are not described."
]
